title: 70-million-year-old fossil reveals ancient raptor behaved like a modern heron
description: Fossilized remains of 70-million-year-old predator dinosaur have been unearthed in Argentina.

title: Hoi An ancient town needs special mechanism for development
description: The value of Hoi An Ancient Town as a World Cultural Heritage site is not limited to the rows of houses in the old town but extends to surrounding areas such as Tra Que vegetable village, Thanh Ha pottery village, Kim Bong carpentry village, and the Cu Lao Cham World Biosphere Reserve...
